title: `FILTER EXISTS` breaks `LIMIT`
key_bug_features: `FILTER EXISTS` with `LIMIT` causes incorrect result count
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_files (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_files (id, name) VALUES (1, 'File A'), (2, 'File B'), (3, 'File C'), (4, 'File D'), (5, 'File E');
CREATE TABLE test_people (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_people (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', 25), (3, 'Charlie', NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM test_files WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_people WHERE test_people.id = test_files.id) LIMIT 1;
